steps.t: Crates can be found around Hen Turrau, east of Barnavon. You should search the crates left at Hen Turrau for further evidence of Saruman's interferenc…
Dunlending guards can be found at Hen Turrau. You should defeat the Dunlending guards that have arrived to garrison the watch-tower.
Gwilum is at Barnavon, far to the west of Hen Turrau. You should report what you have found to Gwilum.
